mapper.insert: insert into campus_user_chat(sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, create_time) values(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, '0', #{createTime})
mapper.select: select chat_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, create_time from campus_user_chat where (sender_id = #{userId} and receiver_id = #{targetId}) or (sender_id = #{targetId} and receiver_id = #{userId}) order by create_time asc

select u.user_id as receiverId, u.nick_name as targetName, u.avatar as targetAvatar, msg.content as lastMessage, msg.create_time as lastTime, (select count(1) from campus_user_chat where sender_id = u.user_id and receiver_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0') as unreadCount from ( select case when sender_id = #{userId} then receiver_id else sender_id end as target_user_id, max(chat_id) as max_chat_id from campus_user_chat where sender_id = #{userId} or receiver_id = #{userId} group by case when sender_id = #{userId} then receiver_id else sender_id end ) s join campus_user_chat msg on s.max_chat_id = msg.chat_id join sys_user u on s.target_user_id = u.user_id order by msg.create_time desc
mapper.update: update campus_user_chat set is_read = '1' where sender_id = #{targetId} and receiver_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from campus_user_chat where receiver_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0'
